blogAuthor.name: Alex Furukawa
blogAuthor.bio: Alex Furukawa is the founder of Iro AI, the gamified app for learning to use AI well. He writes about practical AI fluency — prompting, AI tools, and the daily habits that turn AI from a novelty into real leverage.

cta.heading: Practice this, don't just read it.
cta.body: Iro AI turns ideas like the ones in this post into 5-minute exercises with feedback. Free tier, Pro from $0.96/week ($49.99/year, 7-day free trial).

blog.title: The Iro AI Blog
blog.heroTitle: Practical AI fluency, one post at a time.
blog.description: Short, practical writing on AI fluency, prompting, AI tools, and the active-practice method that beats endless video courses.
blog.feedDescriptionShort: Short, practical writing on AI fluency, prompting, AI tools, and the active-practice method.

blog.pillarsIntro: Each pillar is a complete topic hub. Start there, then dive into the deep-dive posts inside it.
